description: On-board Items from Five Parsecs From Home Core Rules (pp.57-58). These items are not carried into battle by a specific crew member. Instead, they are usually left behind on the ship, and used at other points of the campaign turn.

rules.usage: Used during campaign turn phases, not during battle

onboard_items.name: Analyzer
onboard_items.description: Add +1 when rolling to see if Rumors result in a Quest and when rolling for Quest resolution.

onboard_items.name: Colonist Ration Packs
onboard_items.description: Ignore Upkeep costs for one campaign turn. +1 story point. Single-use.

onboard_items.name: Duplicator
onboard_items.description: Create a perfect copy of any one item in your inventory. A Duplicator cannot copy a Duplicator. Single-use.

onboard_items.name: Fake ID
onboard_items.description: Add +1 to all attempts to obtain a license or other legal document.

onboard_items.name: Fixer
onboard_items.description: One piece of damaged or destroyed personal equipment can be repaired automatically, and at no cost. Single-use.

onboard_items.name: Genetic Reconfiguration Kit
onboard_items.description: Reduce the cost of an ability score upgrade by 2 XP. Has no effect on Bots or Soulless. K'Erin may only use this to increase Toughness. Single-use.

onboard_items.name: Loaded Dice
onboard_items.description: Each campaign turn, one crew member may gamble on the side. Roll 1D6. On a 1-4, earn that many credits. On a 5, earn nothing. On a 6, the locals don't take kindly to losing: The dice are lost and the crew member must roll on the post-battle Injury Table.

onboard_items.name: Lucky Dice
onboard_items.description: Each campaign turn, one crew member may gamble on the side, earning +1 credit. If you have both Lucky and Loaded Dice, you can use both, but rolling a 6 for the Loaded dice means you lose both sets of dice.

onboard_items.name: Mk II Translator
onboard_items.description: When rolling to Recruit, you may roll an additional D6.

onboard_items.name: Med-patch
onboard_items.description: A character recovering from an Injury may subtract one campaign turn from the recovery duration required. If this reduces the time to zero turns, they may act normally this campaign turn. Single-use.

onboard_items.name: Meditation Orb
onboard_items.description: The crew all feel reassured of their karmic balance. Add +2 story points. All Swift or Precursor in the crew may also add +1 XP. Single-use.

onboard_items.name: Nano-doc
onboard_items.description: Prevent one roll on the post-battle Injury Table, no matter the source of the injury. You must decide before rolling the dice. Single-use.

onboard_items.name: Novelty Stuffed Animal
onboard_items.description: Give to any character that isn't Soulless, K'Erin, or a Bot. The character receives +1 XP, and may roll 1D6. On a 6, you may add +1 story point as well. Single-use.

onboard_items.name: Purifier
onboard_items.description: Each campaign turn, the Purifier can be used to generate clean water which can be sold off for 1 credit. This does not require a crew member to operate, but only one Purifier may be used at a time.

onboard_items.name: Sector Permit
onboard_items.description: Whenever you arrive at a planet where a license is required, roll 1D6. On a 4+, the Sector Permit is accepted. You must roll for each license type, on each planet.

onboard_items.name: Spare Parts
onboard_items.description: Add +1 when making a Repair attempt. If the roll is a natural 1, the Spare Parts are used up and must be erased from your roster.

onboard_items.name: Teach-bot
onboard_items.description: A character engaging in the Train crew task will earn 1D6 additional XP. Single-use.

onboard_items.name: Transcender
onboard_items.description: The character activating this mysterious device receives +1 XP. The entire crew makes realizations about their place in the cosmos. Add +2 story points. Single-use.
